series_metadata.series_description: The refund journals for Motor Fuel Tax refunds include the journal entry, the OAKS disbursement information and Auditors warrant journal.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain 4 years after end of calendar year in which application was cancelled, then destroy. ; Electronic: Retain 4 years after end of calendar year in which application was cancelled, then destroy., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Erase
